conditions.method: first-principles BTE (solver unstated: the neutral node is the honest home)

source.detail: "Our first-principles BTE calculations give kz = 2.84 Wm-1K-1 and kr = 39.0 Wm-1K-1" (p. 13). Phonon dynamics and thermal conductivity of PtSe2 thin films (D. Donadio group and collaborators), arXiv:2111.13395
